description: download a skill from a GitHub repo and install it into $CODEX_HOME/skills (destructive)
rules: destructive — writes a new skill tree onto the local filesystem
downloads via zip (codeload), falling back to git sparse-checkout (HTTPS then SSH)
aborts if the destination skill directory already exists
usage: Set REPO (owner/repo), SKILL_PATH (skill subdir in repo), REF (branch/tag), DEST (destination skills dir, e.g. $CODEX_HOME/skills). Output: install.log.
limitation: Destructive: copies a skill into the destination skills dir. Reaches the GitHub API/git; degrades to a recorded error offline.
